betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Lithium Ion Battery§f:
The Basic Lithium Ion Battery (nuclearcraft:lithium_ion_battery_basic) is a single-block energy storage device. It is the first of four tiers (Basic, Advanced, DU, Elite), each offering larger capacity and a tier-specific RF buffer.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:187)§f:
Pattern "PCP / CSC / PCP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateElite, C = lithium_ion_cell (nuclearcraft:lithium_ion_cell), S = solenoidMagnesiumDiboride. Yields 1 Basic Lithium Ion Battery. Energy recipes (addShapedEnergyRecipe) consume FE during crafting, so the crafter must have power.

§6Battery Tier Progression (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:187-190)§f:
The four tiers are nested upgrades, not parallel crafts:
- Basic: plateElite + lithium_ion_cell + magnesium diboride solenoid
- Advanced (recipe 188): 3× Basic Battery in middle row, plateAdvanced + ingotLithiumManganeseDioxide + solenoidMagnesiumDiboride in flanks
- DU (recipe 189): 3× Advanced Battery in middle row, plateDU + ingotLithiumManganeseDioxide + solenoidMagnesiumDiboride in flanks
- Elite (recipe 190): 3× DU Battery in middle row, plateElite + ingotLithiumManganeseDioxide + solenoidMagnesiumDiboride in flanks

§6Direct Descendants of Basic Lithium Ion Battery (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 2 items that use the Basic Battery:
- nuclearcraft:lithium_ion_battery_advanced (Advanced Lithium Ion Battery) — second-tier storage with higher capacity
- qmd:drill_advanced (Advanced Electric Mining Drill) — high-tier QMD mining tool

§6Role in NC Power Systems§f:
The Lithium Ion Battery family replaces or supplements RF Capacitors as mid-game energy storage. It accepts RF from any generator (Voltaic Pile, Solar Panel, Fission Reactor, etc.) and outputs RF to consumers. Each tier roughly doubles capacity and improves charge/discharge rates.

§6Upstream Materials§f:
The Basic Battery needs:
- lithium_ion_cell (separate NC item, made from Lithium + Carbon + Electrolyte in an Ingot Former)
- plateElite (Elite Plating — see Elite Plating quest)
- solenoidMagnesiumDiboride (made from Magnesium Diboride wire in a Manufactory)

§6QMD Drill Use§f:
The QMD Advanced Electric Mining Drill consumes a Basic Lithium Ion Battery to operate. It is the highest-tier mining tool in QMD, capable of mining rare earths and deep ores that standard drills cannot.

§eTip§f: Build a row of Basic Batteries and chain them with FE conduits — you can have all of them charge in parallel from a single power source, multiplying your effective storage.

§eTip§f: The Advanced, DU, and Elite batteries don't have separate quests — craft them in-world from the Basic Battery, then return to the QMD drill quest to satisfy the requirement.

§cWarning§f: Each battery tier uses a stronger plate, not a stronger cell. Always have a steady supply of plateAdvanced, plateDU, and plateElite available before attempting the upgrade chain.
